HeroSection.title: BreakTime
HeroSection.description: Smart assistant for break reminders. Eye exercises, stretching, and walks - all for your comfort and productivity.

RemindersSection.title: Reminders Settings
RemindersSection.description: Choose which reminders you want to receive, or create your own

eye-exercises.title: Eye Exercises
eye-exercises.description: 20-20-20 rule: every 20 minutes look at an object 6 meters away for 20 seconds

stretch.title: Stretch
stretch.description: Light physical activity to prevent musculoskeletal diseases

walk.title: Walk
walk.description: Short walk to improve blood circulation and concentration

coffee-break.title: Coffee Break
coffee-break.description: Time to rest and drink your favorite beverage
